---
title: Python webinars
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{layout="[[5, 5, 5, 5], [5, 5, 5, -5]]"}

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Faster DataFrames with &nbsp;![](img/logo_polars.png){width="1.8em"}](wb_polars.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[RIP &nbsp;![](img/logo_pandas.svg.png){width="0.9em"}<br>Welcome &nbsp;![](img/logo_polars.png){width="1.8em"}](wb_polars2.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Accelerated arrays & AD with ![](img/logo_jax.png){width="1.7em"}](wb_jax.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Intro programming for HSS](wb_hss_prog.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[`uv` package manager](wb_uv.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Next generation ![](img/logo_marimo_compact.svg){width="1.8em"} notebooks](wb_marimo.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::{.card .mb-3}

:::{.card-body2}

[Dashboards:<br>![](img/logo_shiny.svg.png){width="1.3em"} &nbsp;vs ![](img/logo_dash.png){width="5.0em"}](wb_shiny.qmd){.card-title-ws .stretched-link}

:::

:::

:::
